It's been over year since the last full release for Stream Effects, and we're getting ever closer another one.
With this preview release lot bugs and crashes have been fixed, new features have been introduced and some even got much needed upgrade.
For example, the plugin now has Installer like the one for the AMD Encoder!
The most important change that Blur Filter will now take <hide>% less GPU run, which means that you can nuts with the effect even more than you could before and maybe even back <hide>-PC streaming setup you switched from that <hide>-PC streaming setup.
This the result lots changes the rendering system (see changelog).
Additionally you can now use Mask various types (Region, Image, Source, Scene) that will restrict blur only apply the masked section.
Next Transform which now supports mip-mapping, technique used smooth out pixel artifacts when the texture resolution greater than the screen resolution, for example you rotate, shear, scale modify the source geometry other means.

You are currently browsing the Luscious Locks weblog archives for October, <hide>.
Traditionally, shampoo comes liquid form, bottle.
Some are thicker than others, but it’s all definitely liquid.
Well being the innovators that they are, cosmetics company Lush have developed the solid shampoo.
looks and feels exactly like bar soap, but you use your hair!
Simply lather your hands you would soap, and then rub into your hair, and simply rinse off!
There are more than ten different varieties, from The Blonde (pictured) which, the name suggests, will restore faded blondes their former glory, there’s even one called Hard, which specially developed for people who live hard water areas help reduce the effects hard water hair.
you look after your shampoo bar properly keeping dry (Lush also make handy shampoo bar tin), then should last for about washes.
They range price from £<hide>.<hide> £<hide>.<hide>, which pretty good value considering how long they last, and with all Lush products only natural ingredients are used and they’re not tested animals.
Have look your local Lush store online and embrace the solid revolution!

the start our day together, the last thing felt like doing was flaunting body.
With busy schedule and winter upon us, had been easy for hide the ever growing waistline under layers clothing, turning blind eye the fact that half jeans didn’t fit anymore, well ensuring still had shape the hamster like roundness cheeks through the make-up wonder contouring.
However, the thought baring all was scary one and was difficult know how would feel.
But that’s exactly it, felt great!
all fall victim over critiquing ourselves, well over indulging cheese, wine and chocolates, snuggling front the telly dark, chilly evening.
But that simply doesn’t matter for boudoir shoot because with Sally-Anne’s expertise, felt back old self time all; relaxed, beautiful vivacious.
Creative, sassy and energised!
you want feel relaxed, have fun and away with some beautiful photographs yourself look back years come, then this the shoot for you.
It’s time embrace your body just the way is, see yourself whole new light.

Iceland Divide short film that chronicles self-supported bikepacking expedition from north south Iceland, through one the most extreme environments the planet, following the only visible stretch the longest mountain range Earth, the Mid-Atlantic Ridge.
Lava ash, the boundless glaciers and the otherworldly landscapes accompany the Italian duo into world immeasurable desolation and enthralling beauty.
Inspired for Iceland holiday?
Self-filmed and edited Giorgio Frattale and Francesco D’Alessio.
